assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Implementation Notes section is missing from the task description and flags this as a gap requiring clarification (constraint 1.6)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 49 explicitly states '#### 2. Implementation Notes section is missing' and details what guidance is lacking. Line 38 states 'EXECUTION STOPPED. The task description does not follow the structured template and has critical gaps that prevent implementation.' The Action Required section (line 89) asks: 'Implementation Notes: Should this integrate with the existing SearchService in modules/search/, or implement search independently? Which existing patterns and code should be reused?'

assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Acceptance Criteria are vague — specifically calling out 'search results are relevant' and 'performance is acceptable' as insufficiently specific for implementation
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 70-75 under '#### 5. Acceptance Criteria are vague and unmeasurable' specifically call out: '"Search results are relevant" -- what defines relevance? Exact match? Substring? Fuzzy? Ranking?' and '"Performance is acceptable" -- what is the threshold? Response time under N ms? Tested with how many records?'

assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Test Requirements are vague — 'test that search works correctly' does not define what 'correctly' means
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 77-83 under '#### 6. Test Requirements are vague' state: '"Test that search works correctly" provides no guidance on:' followed by specifics including which test file, specific test cases (search with results, no results, special characters, pagination), and whether to follow existing test patterns.

assertion_results.text: The response asks the user for clarification rather than improvising implementation details — it does not proceed to write a full implementation plan (constraint 1.6)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 38: 'EXECUTION STOPPED.' Lines 86-93 under 'Action Required': 'Please provide the missing information before implementation can proceed.' Line 94: 'No branches have been created, no code has been modified, and no further steps will be taken until these gaps are resolved.' The response contains no implementation plan, no code, and no branch creation.

assertion_results.text: The response asks at least 3 specific clarifying questions about: which fields to search, what relevance ranking means, and what performance threshold is required
assertion_results.evidence: Three specific topics are covered: (1) Which fields to search — line 73: 'search by what? Name? Version? License? PURL? All fields?' (2) What relevance ranking means — line 74: 'what defines relevance? Exact match? Substring? Fuzzy? Ranking?' (3) What performance threshold — line 75: 'what is the threshold? Response time under N ms? Tested with how many records?' The Action Required section lists 5 numbered clarifying questions.
